positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration featuring a group of anthropomorphic forest creatures (fox, deer, owl, badger) gathered around a glowing, mystical forest clearing. The central element is a single, beautifully rendered oversized mushroom acting as a natural portal. The style should be inspired by sophisticated children's book art and vintage folklore illustrations, with clean, bold linework and rich, saturated but slightly muted jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, gold, moss green). Focus on high contrast and clear silhouettes against a slightly misty, magical background. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical for optimal textile print placement. Use a flat graphic illustration technique with depth achieved through careful color layering. Full view, high detail, vector art quality.
negative: realistic, photo, 3D render, blurry, low detail, watermark, text, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, muddy, jpeg compression
